MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Steve Harris.

Ms. Rasch requested a continuance stating that Steve Harris was no longer with the Institute On Aging (IOA), that the accounting was rejected by the Court because the IOA does not appear as a Party and that the Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee was set for June 4, 2012. Status on the accounting was continued to June 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Consents By The Trust Protectors
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Off Calendar

Attorney-In-Fact'S Petition For Order Authorizing Establishment Of A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for Stephen Harris. Lawrence Lomax (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Urbatsch stated that he filed a supplement to the petition this morning addressing the Examiner's notes. In addition he stated that he had proof of disability eligibilty for Mr. Lomax since 1990, that items 2 and 3 were amendments to the trust for approval of the modifications and that he would withdraw his request for Attorney's fees and Trustee's fees at this time. Furthermore, he stated that he had a copy of Stephen Harris' fiduciary license (#251), that 15604 was a proposal to remove the Institute On Aging and appoint Steven Harris as the trustee, that Mr. Lomax was the only party entitled to notice and that he had waived notice, and that the Government agencies were not entitiled to notice.

The Court took a recess at 9:25 a.m. to review the documents presented by Mr. Urbatsch.

The matter went back on the record at 10:15 a.m. All issues/changes to the Special Needs Trust were adressed off the record.

The Court reviewed and approved the changes made to the Special Needs Trust, (signing the order for the same in open court). Mr. Lomax stated that he was aware of the petition to create a special needs trust and that he understood that the Institute On Aging would be removed as the Trustee and that Steven Harris would be replacing them. Status on filing of the consents by the Trust Protectors was set for January 26, 2009.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

For Order Shortening Time And For Early Hearing Date For Petition For Order Authorizing Establishment Of Of A Special Needs Trust For Expanded Investment Authority And For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
